# opnsense_haproxy_settings (Data Source)

Read OPNsense HAProxy plugin service and global parameter settings.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `cache_enabled` (Boolean) Whether HAProxy cache is enabled.
- `cache_max_age` (Number) HAProxy cache maximum age in seconds.
- `cache_max_object_size` (Number) HAProxy cache maximum object size.
- `cache_max_secondary_entries` (Number) Maximum HAProxy cache secondary entries.
- `cache_process_vary` (Boolean) Whether Vary headers are processed in HAProxy cache.
- `cache_total_max_size` (Number) Total HAProxy cache size in megabytes.
- `close_spread_time` (String) Time window used to spread connection closes.
- `defaults_custom_options` (String) Custom HAProxy default options.
- `defaults_init_addr` (Set of String) Default server init-addr methods.
- `defaults_max_connections` (Number) Default maximum concurrent connections.
- `defaults_max_connections_servers` (Number) Default maximum concurrent server connections.
- `defaults_redispatch` (String) Default redispatch behavior.
- `defaults_retries` (Number) Default retry count.
- `defaults_timeout_check` (String) Default health check timeout.
- `defaults_timeout_client` (String) Default client timeout.
- `defaults_timeout_connect` (String) Default connect timeout.
- `defaults_timeout_server` (String) Default server timeout.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the HAProxy service is enabled.
- `graceful_stop` (Boolean) Whether graceful stop is enabled.
- `hard_stop_after` (String) Maximum time before HAProxy is hard-stopped.
- `logging_facility` (String) Syslog facility for HAProxy logs.
- `logging_host` (String) Syslog host for HAProxy logs.
- `logging_length` (Number) Maximum log line length.
- `logging_level` (String) Syslog level for HAProxy logs.
- `peers_enabled` (Boolean) Whether HAProxy peers are enabled.
- `peers_listen1` (String) First HAProxy peer listen address.
- `peers_listen2` (String) Second HAProxy peer listen address.
- `peers_name1` (String) First HAProxy peer name.
- `peers_name2` (String) Second HAProxy peer name.
- `peers_port1` (Number) First HAProxy peer port.
- `peers_port2` (Number) Second HAProxy peer port.
- `seamless_reload` (Boolean) Whether seamless reloads are enabled.
- `show_intro` (Boolean) Whether the introductory/help text is shown.
- `stats_allowed_groups` (Set of String) Allowed HAProxy statistics groups.
- `stats_allowed_users` (Set of String) Allowed HAProxy statistics users.
- `stats_auth_enabled` (Boolean) Whether HAProxy statistics authentication is enabled.
- `stats_custom_options` (String) Custom HAProxy statistics options.
- `stats_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the HAProxy statistics page is enabled.
- `stats_port` (Number) HAProxy statistics page port.
- `stats_prometheus_bind` (String) HAProxy Prometheus exporter bind address.
- `stats_prometheus_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the HAProxy Prometheus exporter is enabled.
- `stats_prometheus_path` (String) HAProxy Prometheus exporter path.
- `stats_remote_bind` (String) Remote bind address for HAProxy statistics.
- `stats_remote_enabled` (Boolean) Whether remote access to HAProxy statistics is enabled.
- `store_ocsp` (Boolean) Whether OCSP responses are stored.
- `tuning_bogus_proxy_enabled` (Boolean) Whether bogus PROXY protocol support is enabled.
- `tuning_buffer_size` (Number) HAProxy buffer size.
- `tuning_custom_options` (String) Custom HAProxy global options.
- `tuning_h2_initial_window_size` (Number) HTTP/2 initial window size.
- `tuning_h2_initial_window_size_incoming` (Number) HTTP/2 incoming initial window size.
- `tuning_h2_initial_window_size_outgoing` (Number) HTTP/2 outgoing initial window size.
- `tuning_h2_max_concurrent_streams` (Number) HTTP/2 maximum concurrent streams.
- `tuning_h2_max_concurrent_streams_incoming` (Number) HTTP/2 incoming maximum concurrent streams.
- `tuning_h2_max_concurrent_streams_outgoing` (Number) HTTP/2 outgoing maximum concurrent streams.
- `tuning_lua_max_mem` (Number) Lua maximum memory in megabytes.
- `tuning_max_connections` (Number) Maximum concurrent connections.
- `tuning_max_dh_size` (Number) Maximum Diffie-Hellman parameter size.
- `tuning_nbthread` (Number) Number of HAProxy threads.
- `tuning_ocsp_update_enabled` (Boolean) Whether automatic OCSP updates are enabled.
- `tuning_ocsp_update_max_delay` (Number) Maximum OCSP update delay in seconds.
- `tuning_ocsp_update_min_delay` (Number) Minimum OCSP update delay in seconds.
- `tuning_resolvers_prefer` (String) Preferred resolver IP protocol.
- `tuning_root` (Boolean) Whether HAProxy runs with root privileges.
- `tuning_spread_checks` (Number) Health check spreading percentage.
- `tuning_ssl_bind_options` (Set of String) Global SSL bind options.
- `tuning_ssl_cipher_list` (String) TLS 1.2 and earlier cipher list.
- `tuning_ssl_cipher_suites` (String) TLS 1.3 cipher suites.
- `tuning_ssl_defaults_enabled` (Boolean) Whether global SSL defaults are enabled.
- `tuning_ssl_max_version` (String) Maximum SSL/TLS version.
- `tuning_ssl_min_version` (String) Minimum SSL/TLS version.
- `tuning_ssl_server_verify` (String) Default server certificate verification behavior.
